name: Creamy Milk Chocolate Fudge
recipeInstructions:
1. Line an 8-or 9-inch square baking pan with waxed paper.
2. In a heavy, medium-sized saucepan over low heat, melt all chips with sweetened condensed milk, marshmallows, and salt; stir until smooth and well blended.
3. Remove from heat, stirring in nuts and vanilla.
4. Spread evenly into the prepared pan.
5. Chill for 2 hours, or until firm.
6. Turn fudge onto a cutting board, peel off paper, and cut into squares.
7. Store loosely covered at room temperature.
Makes about 2 pounds.
